title: Arbeitsagentur.de Scraper - German Federal Job Board
input_schema:
{
  "title": "Arbeitsagentur.de Job Scraper Input",
  "type": "object",
  "schemaVersion": 1,
  "properties": {
    "directUrls": {
      "title": "Direct Job URLs",
      "type": "array",
      "description": "Optional: Direct URLs to specific job listings to check status",
      "editor": "stringList",
      "items": {
        "type": "string",
        "pattern": "^https://"
      }
    },
    "searchQueries": {
      "title": "Search Keywords (Was)",
      "type": "array",
      "description": "One or more search keywords. Each keyword runs as a separate search. Results are deduplicated across queries.",
      "editor": "stringList",
      "placeholderValue": "Softwareentwickler",
      "prefill": [
        "Software Engineer"
      ],
      "items": {
        "type": "string"
      }
    },
    "searchQuery": {
      "title": "Search Keyword (single, legacy)",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Single search keyword (backward compatible). Use 'searchQueries' for multiple keywords.",
      "editor": "textfield",
      "example": "Softwareentwickler"
    },
    "location": {
      "title": "Location (Wo)",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "City, region, or area (e.g., 'Munchen', 'Berlin', 'Nordrhein-Westfalen')",
      "editor": "textfield",
      "example": "Munchen",
      "prefill": "Berlin"
    },
    "bundesland": {
      "title": "Bundesland (Federal State)",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "German federal state code",
      "editor": "select",
      "default": "",
      "enum": [
        "",
        "BW",
        "BY",
        "BE",
        "BB",
        "HB",
        "HH",
        "HE",
        "MV",
        "NI",
        "NW",
        "RP",
        "SL",
        "SN",
        "ST",
        "SH",
        "TH"
      ],
      "enumTitles": [
        "All States",
        "Baden-Wurttemberg",
        "Bayern (Bavaria)",
        "Berlin",
        "Brandenburg",
        "Bremen",
        "Hamburg",
        "Hessen",
        "Mecklenburg-Vorpommern",
        "Niedersachsen",
        "Nordrhein-Westfalen",
        "Rheinland-Pfalz",
        "Saarland",
        "Sachsen",
        "Sachsen-Anhalt",
        "Schleswig-Holstein",
        "Thuringen"
      ]
    },
    "employmentType": {
      "title": "Employment Type (Beschaftigungsart)",
      "type": "string",
      "description": "Type of employment",
      "editor": "select",
      "default": "",
      "enum": [
        "",
        "VOLLZEIT",
        "TEILZEIT",
        "MINIJOB",
        "AUSBILDUNG",
        "PRAKTIKUM",
        "FREIBERUFLICH",
        "HEIMARBEIT"
      ],
      "enumTitles": [
        "All Types",
        "Vollzeit (Full-time)",
        "Teilzeit (Part-time)",
        "Minijob (Mini job)",
        "Ausbildung (Apprenticeship)",
        "Praktikum (Internship)",
        "Freiberuflich (Freelance)",
        "Heimarbeit (Remote work)"
      ]
    },
    "maxResultsPerQuery": {
      "title": "Max Results per Query",
      "type": "integer",
      "description": "Maximum results per search keyword. Each query gets up to this many results (deduplicated).",
      "default": 100,
      "minimum": 1,
      "prefill": 5
    },
    "maxResults": {
      "title": "Max Total Results",
      "type": "integer",
      "description": "Total cap across all queries. Set to 0 for unlimited (each query limited by maxResultsPerQuery).",
      "default": 0,
      "minimum": 0
    },
    "includeJobDetails": {
      "title": "Extract Contact Details (with Captcha Solving)",
      "type": "boolean",
      "description": "Extract contact details (email, phone, contact person) via ML-powered captcha solving, plus full job description, company website, logo, and description. Pure HTTP -- no browser needed. Slower (~3-5s/job) but provides valuable data hidden behind a captcha.",
      "default": false
    },
    "proxyConfiguration": {
      "title": "Proxy Configuration",
      "type": "object",
      "description": "Apify proxy settings (recommended for reliable scraping)",
      "editor": "proxy",
      "default": {
        "useApifyProxy": true
      }
    }
  }
}

raw.name: arbeitsagentur-de-scraper
raw.description: Extract jobs from Germany's official employment agency (Bundesagentur für Arbeit). Get job titles, companies, locations, salaries, descriptions & contact details with ML-powered captcha solving. Supports search filters, direct URLs & job status checks.
raw.title: Arbeitsagentur.de Scraper - German Federal Job Board

apify-actor-start.eventDescription: Charged when the Actor starts running. Number of events charged depends on Actor memory (one event per GB, minimum one event).

apify-default-dataset-item.eventDescription: Single job listing in the default dataset

job-with-contact.eventDescription: Charged when contact details (email/phone) are extracted via captcha solving

pricingInfos.reasonForChange: Aligned pricing across all DACH job scrapers to a unified pay-per-event model. New custom events (job-serp-result, job-detail-result) replace the default dataset-item pricing for more transparent, usage-based billing.

apify-actor-start.eventDescription: Charged when the Actor starts running. Number of events charged depends on Actor memory (one event per GB, minimum one event).

job-serp-result.eventDescription: Job Result with the details available on SERP

job-detail-result.eventDescription: Job Result with the details available on Job Detail Page

raw.readmeSummary:
## Arbeitsagentur.de Job Scraper

A scraper for job listings on Arbeitsagentur.de (Bundesagentur für Arbeit) that performs API-based searches and returns structured, searchable job data: titles, company information (name, website, logo, description), location and federal-state metadata, salary ranges and currency/period, employment type and workload/remote flags, full job descriptions, posting and modification dates, application links and contact details (email, phone, contact person) when available. The Actor uses a pure-HTTP architecture (no browser) to call public REST endpoints for search, job details, and employer profiles, and it performs a captcha-protected contact-data retrieval flow that uses an ONNX neural-network solver to extract hidden contact information. Features include multi-keyword runs with automatic deduplication, direct-URL status checks for specific listings, optional deep extraction of company and contact data, and output formatted to a standardized job-listing schema. Performance characteristics: low-memory/high-speed search mode and a higher-memory slower mode when fetching full job details and contact data.

## Use cases

- Run multi-keyword searches across Arbeitsagentur.de and deduplicate results from multiple queries.
- Filter searches by location, federal state, and employment type to collect region-specific job listings.
- High-volume scraping of basic listing metadata (titles, locations, posting dates) in a fast, low-memory mode.
- Full extraction of listings to obtain complete descriptions, structured salary data, employer profiles (website, logo, description), and contact details unlocked via captcha solving.
- Check the status or availability of individual job postings via direct-URL mode.
- Enrich job datasets for recruitment sourcing, market intelligence, job-market monitoring, or HR analytics with standardized job-listing records.
